subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath attained unto the choice wine of revelation when its seal was broken by the hand of the will of his Lord, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن فاز برحیق الوحی اذ فک ختمه باصبع اراده ربه المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Manifestation of God as sun, @praise and encouragement
